series_metadata.series_title: Refund of Expenditure Within the Biennium for Prio
series_metadata.series_description: Used to record receipts or repayment where the original payment was in error, duplicated, or made illegally. This is done within the biennium for the prior year

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
